info.description: Hands-on lab step for a topic, matching TOPICS[].interactive in studio-vr's courseData.js (e.g. speaker-lab, equalizer-lab).

kind.description: Which lab component studio-vr should mount, e.g. "speaker-lab", "equalizer-lab", "compressor-lab", "daw-comping-lab", "sweet-spot-lab". Left as free text so new labs don't require a schema change.
